description: Physics fix: use ray marching final direction instead of double-deflection. RK4: remove intermediate normalize(). Perf: analytic adaptive step, factorized disk transforms, branchless blackbody, explicit FBM rotation, r2 param caching. Doppler beaming g^3 -> g^4. Beer-Lambert: absorption depends on zf*turbFactor. Shadow: smooth blend at 0.95 threshold. Orbital tracking: atan(azimuth) with unwrap. Pass cosPsi/sinPsi as function params. Factorized nebula. diskAcc clamp 3->10. Removed dead uTimeOffset uniform. JS: IIFE encapsulation, DPR fix, pinch intuitive, null safety, Float32Array camPos. README: fix distance/zoom/reset values, document fullRes. Meta tags, .gitignore, docker-compose restart policy.
